name: sharmeats
description: Sharm Eats — multi-category delivery super-app for Sharm el-Sheikh (food first). Monorepo: customer + driver apps (Expo), merchant + admin dashboards (Next.js), shared packages, Supabase backend.
comment:workspaces: Only shared pure-TS packages are workspaces. The apps (Expo customer/driver, Next.js merchant/admin) and the landing site each manage their OWN node_modules + lockfile, because Expo (React 18) and Next.js (React 19) need different, co-located React versions that npm hoisting would conflict over. Install each app from its own directory.

scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --project-id "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF" --schema public > packages/db-types/database.types.ts
